Bespoke Carpentry · Newquay & Cornwall

Beautiful carpentry, made to fit your home properly.

We are an experienced carpentry company based in Newquay, Cornwall. We offer all carpentry services from built-in cupboards, bespoke fitted wardrobes, floating shelves, wooden floors, fitted kitchens, door hanging, decking design and build, and all-round made-to-measure carpentry.

Proudly serving Newquay and Cornwall — MP Carpentry, 24 years in the trade.
About MP Carpentry

A local carpenter who takes pride in doing the job properly.

I'm an experienced carpenter based in Newquay, Cornwall, helping homeowners create better use of their space with made-to-measure carpentry, fitted storage, kitchens, flooring, decking and more.

After 24 years in the trade, I know that the quality of a job often comes down to the details. Whether it's a single floating shelf or a complete kitchen fit-out, I approach every project with the same care and attention.

Most of my work comes from people who want a good job, clear communication and someone they can trust in their home. That's the standard I aim to deliver on every project.

24Years in the Trade
2yrGuarantee on All Work
24 Years' Experience
Fully Insured Tradesman
Customer-Focused Service
Free, No-Obligation Quotes
Serving Newquay & Cornwall
Why Choose Us

The difference is in the detail.

Good carpentry should look like it belongs in your home. That means accurate measurements, careful preparation, quality materials and attention to the details most people never notice.

Made to Fit Your Home

Every project is measured around your space, your needs and the way you want to use it. The result is a better fit and a cleaner finish.

A Finish You'll Be Happy With

The job isn't finished just because the tools are packed away. We take pride in leaving you with work that looks right, works properly and meets the standard you'd expect.

24 Years of Experience

With 24 years of hands-on experience, there's a good chance we've seen and solved a similar carpentry challenge before.

Local & Reliable

Based in Newquay, we keep things simple: clear communication, reliable appointments and no disappearing once the work is complete.

Services

Carpentry for the spaces that matter.

Whether you need a single piece of made-to-measure storage or a complete fitted kitchen, we'll talk through what you need and find the right way to build it.

01

Built-In Cupboards

Make the most of awkward spaces with storage designed around the room, not forced into it.

02

Bespoke Fitted Wardrobes

Storage designed around your room and the way you use it, with a clean fitted finish that makes the most of every inch.

03

Floating Shelves

Simple, clean shelving made to the exact size you need, with a finish that feels like part of the room.

04

Wooden Floors

Professional fitting of solid and engineered timber flooring, with careful preparation for a finish that looks right and lasts.

05

Fitted Kitchens

From fitting units to finishing touches, we can help create a kitchen that works with the space you actually have.

06

Door Hanging

Doors fitted carefully and accurately, with the attention to detail needed for a clean, smooth finish.

07

Decking Design & Build

Decking designed for your garden and built with Cornwall's weather in mind, creating a practical outdoor space you'll enjoy using.

08

Made-to-Measure Carpentry

Have a project that doesn't fit neatly into one of the services above? Get in touch and we'll talk through what you have in mind.

09

Free Consultation

Not sure exactly what you need? We'll discuss your ideas, measure the space and provide a clear quote with no obligation.

How It Works

A simple process from start to finish.

1

Get in Touch

Tell me what you're thinking about and, if you have them, send over a few photos or measurements.

2

Free Measure-Up

I'll visit, take a proper look at the space and talk through the best options for your project.

3

Fixed Quote

You'll receive a clear quote based on the work discussed, with no pressure to go ahead.

4

Built & Fitted

Once everything is agreed, we'll arrange the work and complete it carefully, leaving the space clean and the finished job ready to use.

FAQ

A few questions people often ask.

Yes. We can arrange a visit to discuss the project, measure the space and provide a clear, no-obligation quote before any work begins.

I'm based in Newquay and regularly work across the surrounding area, including St Columb, Crantock and Padstow. If you're unsure whether I cover your location, just get in touch and ask.

Often, yes. Matching existing finishes, colours and styles is something we can discuss during the measuring and planning stage.

It depends on the size and type of project, and availability can vary throughout the year. The best thing to do is get in touch as early as possible so we can discuss your project and timescales.

Yes, fully insured — you can hire with confidence.
